title: isostigma peucedanifolium var. crithmifolium
intro: Isostigma peucedanifolium var. crithmifolium, also known as Chinese celery, is a plant species that belongs to the Apiaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Chinese celery include lowering blood pressure, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Chinese celery can be prepared as a herbal tea, a decoction, or a poultice, and is also used in cooking as a flavoring agent, particularly in soups and stews.
